ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion to which the country belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for which the indicators are recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the indicators are recorded */,
  "max_infection_rate" REAL /* Maximum infection rate in the country */,
  "healthy_life_expectancy" REAL /* Healthy life expectancy in the country */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Social support index in the country */,
  "hospital_beds_per_1000" REAL /* Number of hospital beds per 1000 population */,
  "physicians_per_1000" REAL /* Number of physicians per 1000 population */,
  "nurses_per_1000" REAL /* Number of nurses per 1000 population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for which the indicators are recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the indicators are recorded */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita in the country */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate in the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the country */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* Gini coefficient of the country */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the country */,
  "income_share_of_top_10_percent" REAL /* Income share of the top 10% population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_of_life_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality of life indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for which the indicators are recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the indicators are recorded */,
  "freedom_to_make_life_choices" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices index in the country */,
  "life_satisfaction" REAL /* Life satisfaction index in the country */,
  "environmental_quality" REAL /* Environmental quality index in the country */,
  "human_development_index" REAL /* Human development index of the country */,
  "global_peace_index" REAL /* Global peace index of the country */,
  "press_freedom_index" REAL /* Press freedom index of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_of_life_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_sources" (
  "source_mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source mapping record */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was last updated from the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_sources_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES health_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, data analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role mapping record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user role mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the indicator */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES health_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_indicators" (
  "report_indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report indicator mapping record */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report indicator mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_indicators_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES health_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_indicators_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_comments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_versions_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES health_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source being imported */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_export_logs" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "export_status" TEXT /* Status of the export (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_export_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
